typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' Approach - Preserve existing fonts but radically change how they are typeset to kill the 'AI look'.

rules.headings: Use fluid typography up to text-5xl/text-6xl. Apply 'tracking-tighter' and 'leading-[1.1]' for a dense, premium editorial feel (like Superhuman). Never center-align by default.
rules.overlines: Use text-xs to text-sm, uppercase, with massive tracking 'tracking-[0.2em]' (e.g., 'FOR PROFESSIONALS').
rules.body: Use text-base to text-lg with 'leading-relaxed'. Left-aligned for optimal readability.
rules.contrast: Ensure steep hierarchy contrast. If H2 is text-5xl, the supporting body must be text-lg. Skip middle sizes.

colors.strategy: The 'Organic & Earthy' meets 'Swiss High-Contrast'. Preserve the existing brand green but surround it with architectural neutrals.

rules.primary: Preserve exact existing brand green. Use it intentionally for key actions and active states. Do not spray it everywhere.
rules.backgrounds: Use Off-White (#FAF9F6) or Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A). Never use pure #FFFFFF or #000000. Tint grays slightly with the brand green.
rules.surfaces: Use pure contrasting values to background (e.g., 5% white over obsidian) rather than flat mid-grays.
rules.gradients: BANNED: Generic linear gradients. ALLOWED: Extremely soft, blurry radial glows (blur-[100px] to blur-[140px]) acting as ambient light.

glassmorphism.concept: The 'Crystal' Variant. No muddy grays. It must feel like milled glass.
glassmorphism.implementation: Background: bg-white/70 (Light) or bg-black/60 (Dark). Blur: backdrop-blur-xl or backdrop-blur-2xl. Saturation: backdrop-saturate-150 (CRITICAL for the Apple/Superhuman feel). Border: 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40 or border-white/10 for dark). Shadow: ambient diffuse shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]).

visual enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle SVG noise overlay fixed to the viewport to kill 'digital flatness'. Mix with opacity-5.

grids.marketing_bento: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Gap: gap-8 to gap-16. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly. Mix spans (e.g., col-span-8 row-span-2 for hero image, col-span-4 row-span-1 for text block) to create asymmetry and negative space.

layouts.overall: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-12, p-16, py-24, py-32).
layouts.client_landing: Focus on emotion, ease of use, and visual discovery (Fresha vibe). Use large immersive image containers with offset typography.
layouts.owner_landing: Focus on control, metrics, and premium tech (Mercury vibe). Use 'Grid Borders' layout where the skeleton of the layout is visible through subtle borders (border-collapse style).
layouts.transitions: Avoid hard horizontal lines between sections. Use overlapping cards (margin-top negative), color bleeding (soft radial gradients connecting sections), or sticky scroll sections to create fluid narrative transitions.

motion.strategy: Cinematic and Restrained. No bouncing or generic 'fade up' on everything.
motion.libraries: framer-motion for interactions, lenis for momentum smooth scrolling.
motion.interactions: Hover states must feel tactile: subtle scale (scale-[1.02]), shadow lift, and color tint. Use 'layout' animations for list sorting or tab switching. Entrance animations should be staggered and slight (y: 20, opacity: 0).

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. ALWAYS check text over gradients/glassmorphism.
accessibility.focus: Use explicit ring outlines for focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500/50 focus:outline-none).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="hero-cta-button").

media.strategy: Close-ups and bold focus. If using device mockups, show half the device, bleed it off the edge of the screen.
media.overlays: Hero images must NOT have heavy black blankets. Max overlay bg-black/40. If more contrast needed, use a gradient that fades to transparent.

3d libraries.strategy: Only use if it enhances the product story.
3d libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion 3D for simple 2.5D card tilts. No complex R3F scenes unless the user requests a deep interactive element, keep it clean and fast.

hero_client.description: High-end salon interior or person getting a haircut, close up, soft lighting.

hero_owner.description: Professional looking at a tablet or managing a desk, premium lighting.

instructions_to_main_agent: PRESERVE EXACT TEXT AND FUNCTIONALITIES: Do not alter the copy. Do not remove any existing navigation or CTAs.
PRESERVE BRAND ASSETS: Identify and use the existing brand green and fonts. Apply them using the new typographic scales and layout rules.

IMPLEMENT DUAL PAGES: Ensure the Client page leans into the Fresha/Superhuman aesthetic (discovery, emotion, clean glass) and the Owner page leans into Mercury (premium fintech, structural, metric-driven).
APPLY FLUID TRANSITIONS: Connect sections smoothly. Overlap containers using negative margins, or use soft gradient backgrounds that flow from one section to the next.
EXECUTE GLASSMORPHISM: strictly follow the 'Crystal Variant' rules in this JSON. No transparent dropdowns.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create distinctive frontends.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical bento grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) combined with 1px borders.
NEVER center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant emojis (🤖🧠💭) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Add subtle grain textures and custom selection states.
Missing categories for images MUST NOT use placeholder text.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
